verdict: A highly repetitive, auto-generated-feeling chart that completely sacrifices drum-to-lane consistency and melodic contour for mindless lane-cycling.

issues.problem: Extremely repetitive pendulum pattern (NOTE-BAR-GAP-BAR) on every half-note that completely ignores the snare hits on beats 2 and 4, making the intro feel empty and disconnected from the groove.

Uses a mindless, looping 3-lane 'washing machine' pattern (BAR -> GAP -> NOTE) on every single beat for 15 seconds straight. It completely ignores melody shifts and feels incredibly tedious and uninspired to play.

Inconsistent lane assignment for percussion. Because of the strict three-lane loop, the snare lands on GAP at 14.68s, BAR at 15.68s, and NOTE at 16.68s. This constantly shifting drum placement feels physically unintuitive.
The chart rhythm abruptly dies out, ending with a single sparse note at 31.19s, leaving the energy of the final bars completely unmapped and unresolved.
